ddls:
CREATE TABLE "claims_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line item in a claim */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the claim this line item belongs to */,
  "item_charge_amount" REAL /* Charge amount billed for this line item */,
  "provider_payment_amount" REAL /* Total payment amount received for this line item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item or service provided */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item or service provided */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the item or service */,
  "dispense_date" TEXT /* Date when the item or service was dispensed */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the service_ids table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_details_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES service_ids ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_ids" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the service type */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the service type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., claims analyst, pharmacist) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status update */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the claim this status belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the claim (e.g., submitted, approved, denied) */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was updated */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status of the claim */,
  "next_status_date" TEXT /* Expected date for the next status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the claim being processed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken during processing (e.g., reviewed, updated) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "processed_by" INTEGER /* User who performed the action */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_logs_processed_by FOREIGN KEY ("processed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescribers" (
  "prescriber_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prescriber */,
  "prescriber_name" TEXT /* Full name of the prescriber */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the prescriber */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the prescriber */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prescriber_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pharmacies" (
  "pharmacy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pharmacy */,
  "pharmacy_name" TEXT /* Full name of the pharmacy */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the pharmacy */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the pharmacy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pharmacy_id")
)
